description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a hip roof, two above-ground stories, and a spacious, fenced yard. The front facade features a covered porch supported by columns, flanked by two symmetrical windows and a central entrance. To the left, there is a pergola-covered patio area with climbing greenery and flowering trees, while the right side includes a driveway leading to a double garage and a manicured lawn. The rear of the bungalow opens to a large swimming pool with a deck, and the property is surrounded by a low, white fence. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the windows are large and rectangular, providing ample natural light. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor living spaces and functional landscaping.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a hip roof, covered porch, large windows, a pergola patio, swimming pool, and fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, symmetrical windows, pergola patio on the left, driveway and garage on the right, and landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, garage entrance, lawn, and the pool area extending behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large windows, pool deck, pergola, and the full extent of the fenced backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, pergola, and the side lawn, with the house's hip roof and rear windows visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
